events.title: JOHANNISMARKT
events.summary: The annual Johannismarkt will take place in the town center of Winnweiler with food and drink, rides, live music and fun for all. Shops will be open on Sunday. Get into the swing and enjoy a typical town festival.
events.familyRelevance: Potential weekend outing in the Kaiserslautern Military Community area.

events.title: WEILERBACHER SUMMER NIGHTS
events.summary: For the second time the Weilerbacher Summer Nights are taking place in a relaxed and historic atmosphere. The band “The Twins” will entertain visitors on June 20. The next summer night will be on July 11 with “Luigi Botta and Friends”.

events.title: ABTEIKIRCHENKONZERT (CHURCH CONCERT)
events.summary: Stabat Mater: With his early departure from the opera stage in 1829, Gioachino Rossini composed only larger-scale sacred music alongside chamber music.
